ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station in feet */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of weather station (e.g., automatic, manual) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Last date of station maintenance */,
  "maintenance_notes" TEXT /* Notes on maintenance activities */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the station entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the station entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the station entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the station entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "status" TEXT /* Account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the user entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the user entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data point being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) used for access */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the access log entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access log entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the access log entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data point the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file (e.g., compressed, uncompressed) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure data integrity */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the file entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the file entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the file entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the file entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "meta_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data point the metadata belongs to */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor used to collect the data */,
  "sensor_description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor */,
  "sensor_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "calibration_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the calibration process */,
  "sensor_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "sensor_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the sensor */,
  "sensor_calibration_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of sensor calibration */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the metadata entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metadata entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the metadata entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metadata entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meta_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data point that generated the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., warning, alert) */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was generated */,
  "sent_to" TEXT /* Email address or contact method of the recipient */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  "notification_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the notification (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was sent */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the notification entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the notification entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id")
)
